pages.text: $(bold)Linear motion$() for doors, drawbridges, lifts, and digging rigs:$(br)$(li)$(bold)Mechanical Piston$() — pushes a glued structure along a line; add $(bold)Piston Extension Poles$() for reach.$(li)$(bold)Rope Pulley$() — lowers and raises a structure on a rope; great for elevators and quarry frames.
pages.title: Pistons & Pulleys

pages.text: $(li)$(bold)Gantry$() — a carriage on a gantry shaft that moves to an exact position under redstone/clutch control; the precise option for automated placement and big moving machines.$(li)$(bold)Elevator Pulley$() + $(bold)Contraption Controls$() — a multi-floor elevator you call to named floors.$(br2)Mount a Drill or Saw on any of these and you have an automatic miner or harvester.
pages.title: Gantry & Lifts
